crime.value: Serial murder by marriage fraud - multiple husbands/victims killed for inheritance money
crime.quote: it's my understanding that Edward Denbre's death will be investigated as a criminal homicide

victim.value: Edward Denbre, wealthy con artist who became victim of his own mark Joyce, who was more dangerous than he realized
victim.quote: a man of wealth and at an age where he could have enjoyed a worry free life, killed himself

closed_world.value: High-stakes casino gambling circuit in Atlantic City and Vegas where wealthy marks and predators intersect
closed_world.quote: Her favorite place is the high roller tables in casino's. She prefers the high stake baccarat tables

culprit_and_motive.value: Joyce Denbre, serial killer who marries wealthy men then murders them for inheritance money
culprit_and_motive.quote: she's looking for the long run, a marriage to a rich guy who when he's dead leaves everything to her

resolution.value: Private investigator gathers evidence linking Joyce to multiple suspicious deaths, leading to criminal investigation
resolution.quote: Should that be done and Joyce Denbre is arrested and convicted

investigator.value: Private investigator working for Henrietta Thornton's heir to recover stolen inheritance
investigator.quote: the desire of my client is that Henrietta Thornton's funds from her estate be taken away from Joyce Denbre

suspect_architecture.value: Serial killer Joyce Denbre as primary suspect with pattern of murdering wealthy husbands; multiple victims (Howard Palmer, Donald Cummings, Edward Denbre) differentiated by method - drowning, electrocution, suicide staging
suspect_architecture.quote: She prefers the high stake baccarat tables in Vegas and Atlantic City. Sometimes, she'll sleep with a rich guy

red_herring.value: Edward Denbre's apparent suicide staging - made to look like self-inflicted death when actually murder by Joyce
red_herring.quote: Lastly is the suicide of Edward Denbre, a man of wealth and at an age where he could have enjoyed a worry free life

clue_fairness.value: Pattern of suspicious deaths around Joyce revealed through investigation - insurance payouts, accidental deaths, wealthy victims all disclosed to reader
clue_fairness.quote: Her operation is to stalk rich men. Her favorite place is the high roller tables in casino's

social_world.value: Wealthy casino culture and high society - Joyce exploits class dynamics, targeting rich widowed men at exclusive gambling venues and charity events
social_world.quote: I intend to attend a lavish garden party being held to raise funds for UNESCO

reveal_mechanic.value: Detective investigation connecting pattern of deaths across multiple jurisdictions, revealing Joyce's systematic targeting of wealthy men
reveal_mechanic.quote: Edward Denbre's death will be investigated as a criminal homicide

_meta.title: ebook robert f clifton the wives of edward denbre
